ops.text: Every `brew update`/`brew upgrade` on this machine (yBook-Pro) aborts with a curl 404 fetching formulae.brew.sh/api/cask/portingkit.json while processing /opt/homebrew/Library/Taps/yasyf/homebrew-tap/Casks/cc-sudo.rb:11 — the tap's cc-sudo cask references a cask ("portingkit") that no longer exists in the Homebrew API. It doesn't block cc-guides upgrades (they complete despite the error) but it makes every brew invocation exit non-zero with noisy output, which cost me two double-takes during the v0.1.38 upgrade dance. The cc-sudo cask in yasyf/homebrew-tap needs its portingkit reference fixed or removed.
